package rulecoverage

func NegativeSliceGrowWithoutCapHint() string {
    ruleID := "slice_grow_without_cap_hint"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`var result []T` followed by `append` in a loop where the iteration count is visible from a `len()` or range source"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
